codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers feature requirements. Hero section with headline 'Complete SSC GD Preparation in One App', subheadline, and CTA to /signup. Feature highlights section with 4 cards (Written Exam Prep, Physical Training, Document Readiness, Analytics). Pricing preview with 4 tiers (Free ₹0, Monthly ₹499, Quarterly ₹1199, Yearly ₹3999). FAQ accordion with 5 questions using native HTML5 <details>/<summary> elements. LanguageToggle component with EN/HI cookie-based switching. Footer with company info, platform links, company links, and social icons. Mobile-responsive with Tailwind CSS (verified no horizontal scroll at 375px). Typecheck and lint passed. Agent-browser verification confirmed page loads, CTA navigates to /signup, Hindi toggle works, mobile responsive.

sharedStateObservations.observation: services.yaml does not exist in .factory/ directory. No services were started by the worker that would require documentation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml ENOENT - file does not exist. Worker used existing running services for verification.

summary: Landing page feature implementation passes review. All required components present: hero, features (4 cards), pricing (4 tiers), FAQ (5 questions), bilingual toggle, footer with social icons. Mobile responsiveness verified. Typecheck and lint passed without errors. No blocking issues found.
